Selected Toolchain Project

E2E GUI Time-Series AI Model Training Platform

Python / PyQt5 / MF4 / PyTorch / ONNX / MATLAB Export

GUI-driven MF4 time-series preprocessing, training, evaluation, and export platform for ADAS engineers.

This page keeps the clean portfolio format but restores the original interactive architecture: click diagram blocks to display implementation details and screenshots.

Interactive Diagram RestoredMF4 / ASAM MDF4PyQt5pyqtgraph asammdfTCN / LSTM / TransformerONNXMATLAB

Objective

The tool gives ADAS engineers a single GUI workflow to load logs, select signals, preprocess and normalize data, train deep learning models, evaluate predictions, and export models for simulation or real-vehicle bypass.

7Python source files
4ML model types
3export formats
TCNprimary model arch
MF4input format

System Architecture — Click Blocks

Click blocks to see descriptions: MF4 input, MainWindow, TrainingWindow, model registry, checkpoint, exports, and evaluation window.
ⓘ Click any block in the diagram above to see its original description.

Original Model Plugin Architecture

The _models/ package is a plugin-style registry for TCN, LSTM, Transformer, and custom model classes.

Original Export Flow

Export path supports ONNX Runtime deployment, MATLAB import/simulation, and checkpoint reconstruction.

Original UI Screenshots

Team Impact

  • Gives each ADAS module owner a reusable AI training pipeline instead of isolated scripts.
  • Connects to the E2E GUI bypass platform by exporting ONNX models for real-vehicle validation.
